text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before beginning our training for the day, I
explain today's regimen to Sweep Tosho.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...No. Whenever I run in the dirt, it gets in my
shoes, so I'm not doing it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't like ramp training either. It makes me
tired.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho doesn't seem to be in the mood to
cooperate. Maybe I can interest her with...
choice_data_list:
We can do some magic training during the
breaks.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel like moving today! I'm just gonna sit
here and watch TV! I'm not moving one inch from
this spot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She won't even bite on something she's interested
in. She may still be exhausted from racing, so I
might need to rethink her schedule.
